summary: Frontend testing of 3 NEW changes: Navigation PayAnywhere moved, Dejavoo modal redesign, Maverick purple button. 2 of 3 changes VERIFIED WORKING. 1 change CANNOT be implemented due to cross-origin iframe limitation.

design_issues.issue: Continue button is GREEN, not purple gradient as requested
design_issues.root_cause: The MaverickClient widget renders content inside a CROSS-ORIGIN IFRAME from merchantsolutionscorpdb.com. CSS injection in maverick-apply.html CANNOT override styles inside cross-origin iframes due to browser Same-Origin Policy security restrictions.
design_issues.technical_details: The iframe src is: https://merchantsolutionscorpdb.com/boarding/campaign/embed - this is a different domain that the application does not control
possible_solutions: Contact merchantsolutionscorpdb.com to request a purple theme option for the widget
Check if MaverickClient config supports custom theme/button colors (currently theme: 'dark' is used)
If merchantsolutionscorpdb.com is an internal service, update the button styling on their server

details.feature_tested: PayAnywhere POS moved from POS Systems to Payment Terminals in navigation mega menu
verification: Mega menu opened showing 4 sections: POS Systems, Payment Terminals, Self-Ordering & Kiosk Systems, Online Payments
POS Systems section has 6 items (NO PayAnywhere): POS Systems Overview, Clover, Square, Exatouch, DaySmart Salon, Union POS
Payment Terminals section has 5 items (INCLUDING PayAnywhere): Payment Terminals Overview, PayAnywhere POS, Smart Payment Terminals, Dejavoo Terminals, Ingenico Terminals

modal_title.verified: QD4 Countertop title + 'Choose the plan that works best for your business' subtitle

most_popular_badge.tested: Left card has 'MOST POPULAR' purple gradient badge at top
most_popular_badge.verified: Badge visible with purple gradient background and white text

dual_pricing_card.tested: Left card is Dual Pricing Program with purple border and 4 benefits
verified: $0 Fee Next Day Funding / Same-Day Funding

flat_rate_card.tested: Right card is Flat Rate Program with gray border and 4 benefits
verified: $0 Fee Next Day Funding / Same-Day Funding

apply_now_buttons.tested: Both cards have rounded Apply Now buttons
apply_now_buttons.verified: Dual Pricing has purple gradient button, Flat Rate has blue-to-purple gradient button

advantage_program_disclosure.tested: Bottom disclosure shows Advantage Program terms

apply_now_flow.tested: Apply Now buttons close modal and open Activation & Shipping Deposit popup
apply_now_flow.verified: Both Dual and Flat Rate Apply Now buttons trigger activation popup

no_stale_data.tested: Different terminals show correct names in modal
no_stale_data.verified: QD4 shows 'QD4 Countertop', P18 shows 'P18 Countertop POS'

details.feature_tested: Change Maverick boarding form Continue button from green to purple gradient
details.css_implementation: maverick-apply.html has CSS rules and MutationObserver for purple styling
details.why_not_working: The MaverickClient widget renders inside a CROSS-ORIGIN IFRAME from merchantsolutionscorpdb.com. Browser Same-Origin Policy prevents CSS/JS in the parent document from affecting content inside cross-origin iframes.
details.result: FAIL - architectural limitation, not a code bug

action_items: CRITICAL: The Maverick Continue button CANNOT be styled from maverick-apply.html due to cross-origin iframe security. Options: 1) Contact merchantsolutionscorpdb.com to add purple button theme, 2) Check if MaverickClient config supports button color customization, 3) If you control merchantsolutionscorpdb.com server, update button styles there
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.jsx: PayAnywhere correctly moved to Payment Terminals section (line 103)
DejavooTerminals.jsx: PricingModalContent redesigned correctly with MOST POPULAR badge, benefit checkmarks, and Advantage Program disclosure
maverick-apply.html: CSS injection approach cannot work due to cross-origin iframe - this is a browser security limitation, not a code bug

success_rate.frontend: 67% (2/3 features working, 1 blocked by external dependency)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests 1 (Navigation) and Test 2 (Dejavoo Modal) are 100% working. Test 3 (Maverick purple button) CANNOT be fixed via CSS injection due to cross-origin iframe. The MaverickClient widget from merchantsolutionscorpdb.com controls the button styling.
rca_of_the_issue: Maverick Continue Button Issue RCA: The button is GREEN because MaverickClient renders content inside a cross-origin iframe (merchantsolutionscorpdb.com domain). Browser Same-Origin Policy prevents any CSS or JavaScript in maverick-apply.html from accessing or modifying elements inside this iframe. The CSS injection and MutationObserver in maverick-apply.html can only affect the parent document, not iframe content. Solution requires server-side changes on merchantsolutionscorpdb.com or finding a MaverickClient configuration option for custom button colors.
